content: 4-week social content calendar structure for music release: Week 1 (release week): Release day = multi-platform announcement, streaming links, personal message. Days 2-3 = thank-you posts, early listener reactions. Days 4-7 = behind-the-scenes, story of the song, continue CTAs (save/share/add to playlists). Week 2: Behind-the-scenes from recording, alternate takes or acoustic version, lyric graphics, fan reaction reposts, curator pitch activity. Week 3: Milestone celebration (if any), longer-form content (YouTube video about the making-of), push DropReady captions for new angles on the song. Week 4: Throwback to recording process, what's next teaser, final organic push. Cadence: 3-5 posts/week across platforms. Highest volume on release week. Post-release content sustains the Spotify algorithmic window (Discover Weekly evaluates 1-4 weeks post-release). TikTok-specific: post multiple snippets as separate videos, test different parts of the song.
